title: [遍地攬炒] 一人一信幫何君堯律師世世代代享受大灣區榮耀

replies.msg:
是咁的，隔離巴打推緊一個白宮聯署要求禁止執葉大律師何君堯申請入境美國/綠卡同埋簽證。

詳情睇呢度：
請大家幫下何君堯律師
https://lih.kg/1351101

要達到攬炒嘅效果，淨係簽個名係唔夠嘅！
所以我哋要將行動升級！

一人一信send 去美國國土安全部：
https://www.dhs.gov

教學：
1.填寫個人資料

2.Suspected violation 揀 Terrorism Related

3.填返元朗事件發生地址，任何發生白衣人毆打市民嘅地方都可以

4.The complaint involves 揀 Both 之後填埋佢律師樓地址 地址自己公海搵啦

5.填埋何律師個人資料同埋住址就掂曬
都係嗰句，地址自己公海搵啦

6. 重點之中嘅重點！Additional Business or Individual 記得填Yes 然後報埋佢仔女

———————————————————————
時間關係，信件Template 都已經準備好！

何妖篇

We STRONGLY urge all relevant departments of the US to deny entry and citizenship application of Junius Ho-Kwan Yiu. Ho is a notorious terrorist and Chinese communist puppet in Hong Kong. It is VERY CLEAR that this man will not uphold America’s longstanding and precious democratic values and likely to spread China’s spying activities and totalitarian values in the US. On July 21st 2019, he has mobilized gang members to attack ALL innocent civilians and press in a train station, causing many injuries. THAT WAS A SERVERE TERRORIST ACT. He has admitted he knows the gang members involved and was found having dinner with them prior to the violent tragic. He has previously mentioned that anyone involved in political protests should be “killed mercilessly” and verbally attacked LGBT group.

———————————————————————
何妖仔仔篇

We STRONGLY urge all relevant departments of the US to deny entry and citizenship application of Conrad Ho-Jun Wang, son of Junius Ho-Kwan Yiu. As son of Junius Ho, we believe his entry to the US will pose a threat to the US as his father is a notorious terrorist and Chinese communist puppet in Hong Kong. It is VERY CLEAR that this man will not uphold America’s longstanding and precious democratic values and likely to spread China’s spying activities and totalitarian values in the US. On July 21st 2019, he has mobilized gang members to attack ALL innocent civilians and press in a train station, causing many injuries. THAT WAS A SERVERE TERRORIST ACT. He has admitted he knows the gang members involved and was found having dinner with them prior to the violent tragic. He has previously mentioned that anyone involved in political protests should be “killed mercilessly” and verbally attacked LGBT group.
———————————————————————
最後，何妖女女篇

We STRONGLY urge all relevant departments of the US to deny entry and citizenship application of Charlotte Ho Jun-Ying, daughter of Junius Ho-Kwan Yiu. As son of Junius Ho, we believe his entry to the US will pose a threat to the US as his father is a notorious terrorist and Chinese communist puppet in Hong Kong. It is VERY CLEAR that this man will not uphold America’s longstanding and precious democratic values and likely to spread China’s spying activities and totalitarian values in the US. On July 21st 2019, he has mobilized gang members to attack ALL innocent civilians and press in a train station, causing many injuries. THAT WAS A SERVERE TERRORIST ACT. He has admitted he knows the gang members involved and was found having dinner with them prior to the violent tragic. He has previously mentioned that anyone involved in political protests should be “killed mercilessly” and verbally attacked LGBT group.
——————————————————————
只要大家一人一信send 去國土安全部，相信何君妖距離世世代代享受大灣區榮耀只會越嚟越近！

西環,元朗同樣重要

迫林鄭抽出何君妖出黎受就係中聯辦幕後動員
